历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 10504→10084→10442→13014→5471. From 2021 to 2024, the overall fluctuation range was between 10000 and 13000. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination model (physics category), the ranking significantly advanced to 5471, with a baseline ranking of approximately 5471. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) at this university in Inner Mongolia: 35 students in 2021, 35 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 35 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 33 students, a decrease of 2 from 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and a slight increase in competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking of Chinese Universities has been stable at 43–46 in recent years (46th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. In 2024, its reputation was somewhat positive (improved cafeteria), while in 2026, it was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot' and medium-to-high short video exposure. No significant admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has two A- or above disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-, which are somewhat related to the university's medical and materials science enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, which aligns well with Soochow University's physics category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Software, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, etc.). The total number of college entrance examination registrants in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000), leading to notably intensified competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Inner Mongolian candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (33–35 science students), accounting for a very low proportion, so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline after the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the continued high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition in the physics category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings slightly declining. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5434, with a range of 4934–5934.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4934–5934, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4934), prioritize aiming for top-tier majors such as (5+3 integrated program) and Computer Science and Technology. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5934), focus mainly on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia: 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10, an increase of 2 from 2025, a slight expansion, easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 43–46 in recent years (46th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2024, its reputation was slightly positive (improved cafeteria), while in 2026, it was slightly negative (campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th, rated as 'relatively hot'. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has two A- or above disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-, which do not directly correspond to its liberal arts admission majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Education, etc.), but Law is a traditional strength of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language/Literature is 'recommended' or 'relatively hot', while Teacher Training/Education is 'divergent and wait-and-see'. The total number of Inner Mongolia college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% from 2025 (about 116,000), sharply intensifying competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Inner Mongolia students. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Inner Mongolia is very small (8–10 people), so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline after the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion in 2026, the substantial increase in the number of local candidates, and the divergence in liberal arts major popularity, the expansion and candidate growth roughly offset each other, but the slightly negative reputation is a drag. It is expected that the history category ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 942, with a range of 772–1112.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 苏州大学医学类在内蒙古自治区近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年5179名（计划9人）、2022年5647名（计划13人）、2023年6565名（计划9人）、2024年6735名（计划9人）、 2025年5326名（计划11人）。整体呈先降后升的V型走势，2023-2024年位次持续下滑至6735名（变易进），2025年大幅回升至5326名（变难进）。2026年医学类招生计划为11人， 与2025年持平，计划总量稳定，供需关系基本不变。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，位于江苏省苏州市，是一所综合类公办本科院校。作为长三角地区知名高校，其医学学科依托苏州大学附属医院群，在 区域内具有较强影响力，对内蒙古考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续较高，临床医学、放射医学等专业因就业前景稳定而备受青睐。苏州大学医学类在内蒙古招生规模较小（每年9-13人），属于稀缺招生计划，竞 争较为激烈。2025年位次大幅回升反映了医学热度回归的趋势，2026年预计维持高位但略有松动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，2026年苏州大学医学类最低录取位次预测为5276名，较2025年（5326名）略降50名，位次数字减小意味着录取难度略有下降。波动区间为501 2至5540名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical programs in Inner Mongolia over the past five years are: 2021: 5179 (plan: 9), 2022: 5647 (plan: 13), 2023: 6565 (plan: 9), 2024: 6735 (plan: 9), 2025: 5326 (plan: 11). Overall, it shows a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing. From 2023 to 2024, rankings continued to decline to 6735 (easier to enter), then rebounded significantly in 2025 to 5326 (harder to enter). The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 11, unchanged from 2025, with stable total plan size and basically unchanged supply-demand relationship.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key construction university under Project 211 and a national Double First-Class construction university. Located in Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province, it is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As a well-known university in the Yangtze River Delta region, its medical disciplines rely on the affiliated hospital group of Soochow University, exerting strong influence in the region and maintaining sustained appeal to Inner Mongolian candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has remained high, with specialties such as Clinical Medicine and Radiation Medicine being highly favored due to stable employment prospects. Soochow University's medical programs have a small enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia (9-13 per year), making them scarce enrollment plans with intense competition. The significant rebound in rankings in 2025 reflects the return of medical popularity, and 2026 is expected to maintain a high level but with slight easing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical programs in 2026 is 5276, a slight decrease of 50 places compared to 2025 (5326). A smaller ranking number indicates a slight decrease in admission difficulty. The fluctuation range is 5012 to 5540. Candidates are advised to plan their preferences reasonably within this range.
